items.headline: Chasing History: Thunder Stay Perfect
items.description: OKC runs their postseason record to 8-0 by completing the sweep against the LA Lakers and punching their ticket to the WCF.

items.headline: Wemby starts Game 5 off hot with 18-point 1st quarter
items.description: Wemby joins Tim Duncan as the only Spurs players to record 15+ points and 5+ rebounds in the 1st Q of the playoffs in the PxP era.
